source:
base="$HOME/.claude-science"
echo "=== top-level of $base ==="
ls -la "$base"
echo; echo "=== org dir ==="
ls -la "$base/orgs/3dfe4daa-34a3-475b-a7d9-194ed338c8cc" 2>/dev/null
echo; echo "=== look for sqlite / db files ==="
find "$base" -maxdepth 4 -type f \( -name '*.db' -o -name '*.sqlite*' -o -name '*.json' \) 2>/dev/null | grep -v workspaces | head -40
